heroHeading: Walking sticks & shillelaghs, made the old way
heroSubheading: Seasoned hardwood, hand-shaped handles and a finish rubbed back by hand. Sticks to walk with, to lean on, and to pass down.
storyHeading: A stick with a story in the grain
storyBody: Every Sherred stick begins as a length of hardwood, chosen for its straightness and character, then seasoned slowly until it is hard and true. The handle is shaped by hand, the shaft rubbed back and oiled, and a brass ferrule fitted for the road.
No two are ever quite alike — the knots, the colour and the curve of each stick are its own.
ctaText: Hiking staffs, dress canes, support sticks and traditional blackthorn.
